actions.action: Click 'Home' button to go to launcher screen
Swipe up from the bottom of the home screen to open the app drawer.
Open the Phone app and tap the Keypad.
Type '123' number manually wait for number to appear in screen the tap the Call button to verify outgoing calls.
Click 'End' red color button to end call , verify that the call ended without any errors
Verify that the status bar shows icons indicating active network data connectivity.
Launch the Chrome app and wait for app to load successfully
In the address bar, type 'www.google.com' skip all suggestions press enter. Verify that the Google webpage loads successfully.
Navigate to device settings screen.
Navigate to 'Wireless and networks' (or 'Network and internet' on newer APIs).Toggle 'Airplane mode' to ON.Verify that the airplane icon appears in the status bar.
Return to Chrome app and Create new incognito tab
Type 'www.facebook.com' in address bar skip all suggestions press enter .Verify that the webpage does not load and shows a connection error.
Go back to System Settings and toggle 'Airplane mode' to OFF.Wait for the network to reconnect.
In Settings, go to 'Data usage' (or 'Mobile network').Toggle 'Mobile data' to OFF.
Return to Chrome app and Create new incognito tab
Type 'www.yahoo.com' in address bar skip all suggestions press enter .Verify that the webpage fails to load.
Return to Settings and toggle 'Mobile data' back to ON ,Verify 'Mobile data' enabled successfully
Return to Chrome app and Create new incognito tab
Type 'www.reddit.com' in address bar skip all suggestions press enter , Verify that the webpage now loads successfully.
Return to Settings and toggle 'Mobile data' back to OFF
Enable Wi-Fi ,wait for Wi-Fi to connect
Return to Chrome app and Create new incognito tab
Type 'www.google.com' in address bar skip all suggestions press enter , Verify that the webpage now loads successfully.
